headlines.headline: Wizards' Alex Sarr has surgery after fracturing right foot
headlines.description: Wizards center Alex Sarr has undergone surgery to repair a fractured right foot and is expected to be healthy for the start of the season, the team announced Monday.

headlines.headline: Source: James Pearce with Falcons, expected to attend minicamp
headlines.description: Falcons edge rusher James Pearce Jr. is back with the team and expected to take part in this week's minicamp, ESPN's Adam Schefter reported Monday.

headlines.headline: Source: Jets, guard Joe Tippmann reach 4-year, $62M extension
headlines.description: The Jets and right guard Joe Tippmann have agreed to a four-year, $62 million contract extension that includes $31 million in new guarantees, sources told ESPN on Monday.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes favored repeat as Cup champs, Avalanche second for 2027
headlines.description: The Carolina Hurricanes, Colorado Avalanche and Vegas Golden Knights are favorites to win the 2027 Stanley Cup.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes favored to repeat, followed by Avs, Golden Knights
headlines.description: The Hurricanes are a leading +700 to win the Stanley Cup for the 2026-27 season, followed by the Avalanche (+800) and Golden Knights (+850). The Oilers (11-1), Panthers (11-1) and Lightning (12-1) make up the next tier of contenders.

headlines.headline: Which NHL teams have won the most Stanley Cup titles?
headlines.description: The Montreal Canadiens have won a record 23 Stanley Cup titles. Check out other championship caliber NHL teams now.

headlines.headline: Who has won a Stanley Cup, Olympic gold in the same year?
headlines.description: Winning Olympic gold and the Stanley Cup in one year remains one of hockey's rarest feats. Check out who has achieved the honor now.
